title: What a man of God actually does with sin
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death.

Most men are trying to turn the volume down. Get it to a manageable level. Read more, feel better, drift back. Repeat for years. That's not Christianity. That's behavior modification with a Bible verse.

Mortification means death — not reduction. "Put to death, therefore, whatever belongs to your earthly nature." — Colossians 3:5. Paul didn't say reduce it. He said kill it.

You can't kill what you haven't named. Not "lust" in general — what time, what trigger, what mood comes first? Name it that precisely and remove the runway.

And the thing you're keeping to yourself still has power. The thing you say out loud — to one honest brother who has your number — starts to die. James 5:16. That's not a suggestion. It's a prescription.

One man. This week. The specific thing.

Send this to the man who needs to hear it.

#faith #christianmen #sin #repentance #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #purity #accountability #christianity
